code: import React from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiClock,FiEdit3,FiCamera}from'react-icons/fi';import TimeTimesheets from'./TimeTimesheets';import TimeAttendance from'./TimeAttendance';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabs=[{key:'timesheets',label:'Timesheets',icon:FiEdit3,component:TimeTimesheets},{key:'attendance',label:'Attendance',icon:FiCamera,component:TimeAttendance}];const TimePage=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"timesheets",moduleIcon:FiClock,moduleTitle:"Time"});export default TimePage;
